summary: Frontend testing of Jobswish app updates completed. Successfully verified job seeker profile completion flow and responsive design. Found critical login redirect issue preventing full testing of applied jobs and recruiter dashboard features.

ui_bugs.issue: Login form submission not redirecting users to their respective dashboards
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents users from accessing main app functionality after login

integration_issues.issue: After successful login, users remain on login page instead of being redirected to dashboard

passed_tests: New job seeker registration shows 'Build Your Resume' prompt instead of job listings
Job seeker cannot see matches until profile skills are filled
After filling profile with skills, job seeker can see matches (shows 'All caught up!')
Container properly sized for desktop viewing (512px width)
Profile completion flow with skills requirement
Backend APIs all working (17/17 endpoints tested successfully)

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (core flows work but login redirect broken)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix login form redirect issue - users can login successfully (backend works) but frontend doesn't redirect to appropriate dashboard (job seeker home or recruiter dashboard). This prevents testing of applied jobs functionality and recruiter features.
